ol.li: FOR i = 1 to num_shards-1: alt_idx = (shard_idx + i) % num_shards IF enqueue(shards[alt_idx], data): RETURN true
FOR i = 0 to num_shards-1: shard_idx = (start + i) % num_shards IF dequeue(shards[shard_idx], out): consumer_idx.store((shard_idx + 1) % num_shards) RETURN true

ul.li: O(1) average case for both producer and consumer
Bounded worst case: O(N) where N = num_shards
